---
title: "FINSTAD Case 1 — Executive Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    css: styles.css
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(knitr)

con <- dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), "data/master_dataset.sqlite")
fin <- tbl(con, "integrated_data") |> collect() |> mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))
palette <- c(AAPL = "#555555", BDO = "#003D6B", BTC = "#F7931A", SPY = "#00733E")
```

```{r compute, include=FALSE}
# Calculate KPIs
kpi_data <- fin |>
  filter(!is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  group_by(Asset) |>
  summarise(
    Total_Return = (last(Close) / first(Close)) - 1,
    Ann_Vol = sd(Daily_Return) * sqrt(252),
    Sharpe = mean(Daily_Return) / sd(Daily_Return),
    Best_Day = max(Daily_Return),
    Worst_Day = min(Daily_Return),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Calculate drawdown for max DD
cum_returns <- fin |>
  filter(!is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  group_by(Asset) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(CumRet = cumprod(1 + Daily_Return) - 1) |>
  ungroup()

dd_full <- cum_returns |>
  group_by(Asset) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(DD = (1 + CumRet) / (1 + cummax(CumRet)) - 1) |>
  ungroup()

max_dd <- dd_full |>
  group_by(Asset) |>
  summarise(Max_DD = min(DD), .groups = "drop")

kpi_data <- kpi_data |> left_join(max_dd, by = "Asset")

# Correlation matrix
cor_mat <- fin |>
  select(Date, Asset, Daily_Return) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = Asset, values_from = Daily_Return) |>
  select(AAPL, BDO, BTC, SPY) |>
  cor(use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

cor_long <- as.data.frame(cor_mat) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Asset1") |>
  pivot_longer(-Asset1, names_to = "Asset2", values_to = "Correlation") |>
  mutate(
    Asset1 = factor(Asset1, levels = rev(c("AAPL", "BDO", "BTC", "SPY"))),
    Asset2 = factor(Asset2, levels = c("AAPL", "BDO", "BTC", "SPY"))
  )

# Risk-adjusted returns
risk_adj <- fin |>
  filter(!is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  group_by(Asset) |>
  summarise(
    Mean_DR = mean(Daily_Return),
    SD_DR = sd(Daily_Return),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Rolling 30-day volatility
rolling_vol <- fin |>
  filter(!is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  group_by(Asset) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(Roll_SD = slider::slide_dbl(Daily_Return, sd, .before = 29, .complete = TRUE) * sqrt(252)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(!is.na(Roll_SD))

# COVID crash returns (Feb-Mar 2020)
covid_crash <- fin |>
  filter(Date >= "2020-02-01", Date <= "2020-03-31", !is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  group_by(Asset) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(CumRet = cumprod(1 + Daily_Return) - 1) |>
  summarise(Crash = last(CumRet), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(Asset = factor(Asset, levels = Asset[order(Crash)]))

# VIX regime analysis
vix_regime <- fin |>
  filter(!is.na(VIX), !is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  mutate(Regime = ifelse(VIX > 30, "High Fear", ifelse(VIX < 20, "Low Fear", "Moderate"))) |>
  filter(Regime %in% c("High Fear", "Low Fear")) |>
  group_by(Asset, Regime) |>
  summarise(Mean_DR = mean(Daily_Return), .groups = "drop")

# Inflation hedge (CPI YoY > 5%)
inflation_hedge <- fin |>
  filter(CPI_YoY > 0.05, !is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  group_by(Asset) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(CumRet = cumprod(1 + Daily_Return) - 1) |>
  summarise(Infl_Return = last(CumRet), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(Asset = factor(Asset, levels = Asset[order(Infl_Return)]))
```

## Row {height=10%}

```{r kpi-total-return}
#| title: "Total Return"
#| echo: false
kpi_data |>
  select(Asset, Total_Return) |>
  mutate(Total_Return = percent(Total_Return, accuracy = 0.1)) |>
  kable(col.names = c("Asset", "Return"), format = "html", table.attr = "class='table table-sm'")
```

```{r kpi-volatility}
#| title: "Volatility"
#| echo: false
kpi_data |>
  select(Asset, Ann_Vol) |>
  mutate(Ann_Vol = percent(Ann_Vol, accuracy = 0.1)) |>
  kable(col.names = c("Asset", "Volatility"), format = "html", table.attr = "class='table table-sm'")
```

```{r kpi-sharpe}
#| title: "Sharpe Ratio"
#| echo: false
kpi_data |>
  select(Asset, Sharpe) |>
  mutate(Sharpe = round(Sharpe, 3)) |>
  kable(col.names = c("Asset", "Sharpe"), format = "html", table.attr = "class='table table-sm'")
```

```{r kpi-max-dd}
#| title: "Max Drawdown"
#| echo: false
kpi_data |>
  select(Asset, Max_DD) |>
  mutate(Max_DD = percent(Max_DD, accuracy = 0.1)) |>
  kable(col.names = c("Asset", "Drawdown"), format = "html", table.attr = "class='table table-sm'")
```

```{r kpi-best-day}
#| title: "Best Day"
#| echo: false
kpi_data |>
  select(Asset, Best_Day) |>
  mutate(Best_Day = percent(Best_Day, accuracy = 0.01)) |>
  kable(col.names = c("Asset", "Best Day"), format = "html", table.attr = "class='table table-sm'")
```

```{r kpi-worst-day}
#| title: "Worst Day"
#| echo: false
kpi_data |>
  select(Asset, Worst_Day) |>
  mutate(Worst_Day = percent(Worst_Day, accuracy = 0.01)) |>
  kable(col.names = c("Asset", "Worst Day"), format = "html", table.attr = "class='table table-sm'")
```

## Row {height=65%}

### Column {width=33%}

```{r correlation-heatmap}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 4
#| fig-height: 1.6
ggplot(cor_long, aes(x = Asset2, y = Asset1, fill = Correlation)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", Correlation)), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#1DC9A4", mid = "#F2F2F2", high = "#2E45B8",
                       midpoint = 0.4, limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Correlation Matrix") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
  )
```

### Column {width=33%}

```{r risk-return}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 4
#| fig-height: 1.6
ggplot(risk_adj, aes(x = SD_DR * 100, y = Mean_DR * 100, color = Asset)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
  labs(x = "Risk (SD %)", y = "Mean Return (%)", title = "Risk vs Return") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
  )
```

### Column {width=34%} {.tabset}

```{r cumulative-returns}
#| title: "Cumulative Returns"
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 4
#| fig-height: 1.6
cum_returns <- fin |>
  filter(!is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  group_by(Asset) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(CumRet = cumprod(1 + Daily_Return) - 1) |>
  ungroup()

ggplot(cum_returns, aes(x = Date, y = CumRet, color = Asset)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B3B3B3") +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Cumulative Returns") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
  )
```

```{r drawdown}
#| title: "Drawdown"
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 4
#| fig-height: 1.6
dd_full <- cum_returns |>
  group_by(Asset) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(DD = (1 + CumRet) / (1 + cummax(CumRet)) - 1) |>
  ungroup()

ggplot(dd_full, aes(x = Date, y = DD, color = Asset)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B3B3B3") +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Drawdown from Peak") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
  )
```

```{r rolling-vol}
#| title: "Rolling Volatility"
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 4
#| fig-height: 1.6
ggplot(rolling_vol, aes(x = Date, y = Roll_SD, color = Asset)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Volatility", title = "30-Day Rolling Volatility") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
  )
```

```{r covid-crash}
#| title: "COVID Crash"
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 4
#| fig-height: 1.6
ggplot(covid_crash, aes(x = Asset, y = Crash, fill = Asset)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%+.1f%%", Crash * 100)), 
            vjust = ifelse(covid_crash$Crash < 0, 1.2, -0.3), 
            size = 3, color = "#333333") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Return", title = "COVID Crash (Feb-Mar 2020)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
  )
```

```{r vix-regime}
#| title: "VIX Regime"
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 4
#| fig-height: 1.6
ggplot(vix_regime, aes(x = Asset, y = Mean_DR * 100, fill = Regime)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(0.7), width = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, size = 0.3, color = "#595959") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("High Fear" = "#C91D42", "Low Fear" = "#2E45B8")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Mean Return", title = "VIX Regime Comparison") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
  )
```

```{r inflation-hedge}
#| title: "Inflation Hedge"
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 4
#| fig-height: 1.6
ggplot(inflation_hedge, aes(x = Asset, y = Infl_Return, fill = Asset)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%+.1f%%", Infl_Return * 100)), 
            vjust = ifelse(inflation_hedge$Infl_Return < 0, 1.2, -0.3), 
            size = 3, color = "#333333") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Return", title = "High Inflation Period (CPI > 5%)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
  )
```

## Row {height=25%}

### Column {width=60%}

```{r recommendation}
#| title: "Investment Recommendation"
#| echo: false
knitr::kable(
  data.frame(
    Asset = c("AAPL", "BDO", "BTC", "Cash"),
    Allocation = c("—", "—", "—", "—"),
    Weight = c("—", "—", "—", "—")
  ),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = "class='table table-sm'"
)
```

### Column {width=40%}

```{r descriptive-stats}
#| title: "Descriptive Statistics"
#| echo: false
knitr::kable(
  data.frame(
    Statistic = c("Mean", "Median", "Variance", "Std Dev", "Min", "Max", "Range", "Skewness", "Kurtosis"),
    AAPL = rep("—", 9),
    BDO = rep("—", 9),
    BTC = rep("—", 9),
    SPY = rep("—", 9)
  ),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = "class='table table-sm'"
)
```

```{r close, include=FALSE}
dbDisconnect(con)
```
